     The Numbers Business Report

Joy (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $56,451,232Details
International Box Office $44,682,827
Worldwide Box Office $101,134,059
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,210,416
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,398,850
Total $6,609,266
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Inspired by the life and times of inventor entrepreneur Joy Mangano, creator of Ingenious Designs with over $1 billion in sales, as well as inspired by elements from the lives of other historic business pioneers. The story of a family across four generations and the woman who rises to become founder and matriarch of a powerful family business dynasty.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,015,168 (30.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,896 opening theaters/2,924 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $79,074,342

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2015 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: December 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Greece)
December 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Israel)
December 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
December 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Denmark)
December 25th, 2015 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: April 8th, 2016 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2399 (Cert #50137), 11/11/2015)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Entrepreneur, Inventor, Professional Rivalry
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Fox 2000 Pictures, Annapurna Pictures, Davis Entertainment, 10 by 10 Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Inspired by the life and times of inventor entrepreneur Joy Mangano, creator of Ingenious Designs with over $1 billion in sales, as well as inspired by elements from the lives of other historic business pioneers. The story of a family across four generations and the woman who rises to become founder and matriarch of a powerful family business dynasty.
